title: Link Nukem VS Ultimate WeeGee Army
description:
Alright, so first of all this video was made by my brother. "Insert his name here" It is his first video, but I did help ALOT in the making of the video how?

I gave 100% of the source and special effect, sprites, sound effect and so on that he used in this video.

All my brother did is name the video and edit the video I didn't touch anything he made beside for the two messages at the begin and one message at the end of the video.


At first he was supposed to make an account of his own and upload it, but he begged me for two whole days so since it's his first video and it's not total crap, I decided to upload it on my main account.

Anyway, I hope you enjoy his video somehow. =P

Also, don't ask me when i'm going to make my next video I won't respond to that...
